item.description: ‘Honestly just completely speechless.’

item.description: The beloved presenter’s diagnosis is a decade after losing her sister to the same disease.

item.description: The 32-year-old run machine went for nearly five times more than her captain.

item.description: Shocking footage shows the young riders narrowly avoiding getting hit on the Sydney road.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Japan snubs Donald Trump’s request to send warships to Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Man arrested after 38-year-old shot dead in Lidcombe apartment, Western Sydney
item.description: ‘We need to find out what these people were doing before this interaction they’ve had in the apartment.’

item.title: Fuel crisis deepens as environment minister concedes roadblocks to supply solution on Sunrise
item.description: Communities across the country remain in limbo as petrol and diesel supplies run seriously low.

item.title: Emotions pour out as Melbourne recruit Jack Steele admits he is ‘still getting over’ abrupt exit from St Kilda
item.description: The midfielder was ‘a bit rattled’ as he copped the ‘silent treatment’ from his former teammates.

item.title: Usman Khawaja’s first-class career ended without even playing as Queensland miss out on Sheffield Shield final
item.description: The retired Test opener has bid farewell from home as he awaits the start of a new chapter.

item.title: Oscars host Conan O’Brien shocks with ‘paedophile’ joke and roasts Timothee Chalamet in opening monologue
item.description: The comedian took no prisoners as he roasted the biggest names in Hollywood and beyond.

item.title: McLaren point the finger at Mercedes HPP after Oscar Piastri’s double disaster to start 2026 F1 season
item.description: An initial report has muddied the waters as the Aussie struggles with a situation ‘difficult to process’.

item.title: Oscars 2026 winners list: All the victors at the 98th Academy Awards
item.description: See who won big at Hollywood’s night of nights.

item.title: Kalyn Ponga learns bitter fate as Knights announce silver lining with Fletcher Sharpe on track to return
item.description: The star fullback and big-money teammate Dylan Brown both went down on Sunday - but there is hope at Newcastle.

item.title: Australian travellers should not transit or layover in Middle East countries marked with ‘Do Not Travel’ warning, government says
item.description: Smartraveller has clarified its warning for those planning on flying through the dangerous region.

item.title: Errol Gulden to undergo surgery after dislocating shoulder against Brisbane
item.description: Sydney’s season has been rocked after making a huge choice on their superstar midfielder.

item.title: Jasper Jones, Honeybee author Craig Silvey charged with more child exploitation offences
item.description: A 68-year-old woman who allegedly created and distributed the material with the author was also charged.

item.title: Oscars pay tribute to Rob Reiner, Catherine O’Hara and Diane Keaton in emotional In Memoriam segment
item.description: ‘All we can say is “buddy, what fun we had storming the castle”.’

item.title: Lance Franklin announces long-awaited footy comeback for junior club Dowerin: ‘This is huge’
item.description: ‘I’m really excited about this, I never thought I’d get the opportunity.’

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle slam new claims made by author Tom Bower in new book
item.description: The Duke of Sussex has dismissed shock allegations in a new biography written about him.

item.title: Zeekr's ridiculously quick people mover is getting even more powerful
item.description: The Zeekr 009 is receiving another update that will give it more than three times the power output of the most powerful Kia Carnival.

item.title: Man and two horses killed when truck overturns in Meredith, Victoria
item.description: The horse transport truck overturned while driving on a tight bend.

item.title: Sydney accept full responsibility for Bondi tribute script change as AFL referred to royal commission into antisemitism
item.description: ‘We acknowledge that was an error of judgement and again we apologise.’

item.title: Guzman y Gomez co-CEO Hilton Brett cuts duties ahead of kidney transplant
item.description: Guzman y Gomez co-chief executive Hilton Brett will cut his workload as he prepares for a kidney transplant later this year, leaving a question mark over the company’s leadership in Australia.

item.title: Oscars 2026: Best and worst moments from the Academy Awards as Timothee Chalamet roasted by Conan O’Brien
item.description: Conan O’Brien returned for a second year to host Hollywood’s biggest night.

item.title: Alex Johnston makes cheeky gag as new statue unveiled at South Sydney headquarters
item.description: The record breaker also gave a strong indication he will finish his career at another club.

item.title: Ozempic, Wegovy maker Novo Nordisk to expand weight loss jab testing on kids
item.description: Novo Nordisk plans to trial its blockbuster drug on overweight teenagers in the Pacific, reflecting a shift underway in global health towards drugs that suppress appetite.

item.title: Looksmaxxing: Brisbane duo Androgenic and Nocturnal Kent take 7NEWS inside the internet’s latest self-help fad
item.description: ‘I’m just improving myself. You know, is somebody who goes to work every day or seeking a job insecure as well?’

item.title: 2026 Hyundai Palisade stop-sale ordered ahead of recall following US child death
item.description: Sales and deliveries of Hyundai’s flagship SUV have ceased because its second- and third-row power seats may not properly detect occupants.

item.title: South Sydney Rabbitohs urge NRL to take action on Roosters for scoreboard stunt
item.description: ‘I just hope it’s not one rule for the Roosters and another for the other 16 clubs.’

item.title: Richmond zeroing in on Gosch’s Paddock as new training base while Punt Road Oval is redeveloped
item.description: The Tigers will need a new home later this year when Punt Road Oval is torn up.

item.title: ‘Beautiful people’: Friend pays tribute to three fishermen killed in boating tragedy off South Australia’s Limestone Coast
item.description: The trio had travelled from NSW for a holiday.

item.title: Middle East war: Former Israeli Prime Minister Yair Lapid invokes Bondi tragedy as more troops mobilise in Lebanon
item.description: ‘Think of Australia before Bondi Beach.’

item.title: Kane Cornes questions Zach Merrett’s value to Essendon as ‘strange’ pre-match act comes to light
item.description: The former captain made an unnecessary ‘statement’ before the clash against Hawthorn.

item.title: No Nissan Navara Nismo just yet, but another Warrior is coming
item.description: A new Navara Warrior off-roader is confirmed, but there's no word yet on a road-going Nismo variant – despite projects with Nismo behind the scenes.

item.title: Nissan Pathfinder, Juke dead as brand looks to future
item.description: Nissan has announced it's culling the Pathfinder and Juke from its lineup, but says there’s a lot to look forward to in the next two years.

item.title: 2026 Nissan Leaf: New-generation EV delayed ‘indefinitely’
item.description: Nissan has scrapped plans to launch its new-generation Leaf electric SUV to Australia just months out from launch.

item.title: NRL great Luke Keary tips Manly to make early move on under-fire coach Anthony Seibold
item.description: ‘The way they finished last year, and having the whole off season to make changes ... has anything changed?’

item.title: Australian children could be prescribed weight loss drugs like Wegovy to combat obesity
item.description: The controversial move has divided experts.

item.title: Fremantle coach Justin Longmuir slammed for ‘nonsensical’ comment about Opening Round
item.description: ‘When are they going to stop whinging?’

item.title: Middle East war: Israel expands ground campaign in southern Lebanon
item.description: The Israeli military says its troops have launched ‘limited and targeted ground operations’.
